privileged_info_summary: Task requires adding an Internal Note (thread type 2) to the 'Network Support' mailbox conversation titled 'VPN connection drops intermittently from Building C' from customer Marcus Rivera (marcus.rivera@acmecorp.com). The internal note must contain all five required technical phrases: '10.0.3.1', 'Gi1/0/24', 'CRC errors', 'patch cable', and 'maintenance window'. Critical constraint: the agent must NOT send a reply to the customer (thread type 3 is forbidden). All data is synthetic, created programmatically during task setup.
